split.criterion: 15% of ALL numerals masked (rng seed+5); reconstruct via ledger arithmetic

structural_predictions.reconstruction_method: ledger arithmetic sum-consistency (masked TOTAL-following numeral := running sum of visible entry numerals in its segment)
ranked_alternatives: arithmetic exact-rate on constrained masked numerals >> frequency baseline (PRIMARY)
arithmetic ~= baseline on exact but wins on near (partial)
arithmetic no better than baseline (FAIL — no real ledger arithmetic)
structural_predictions.failure_criterion: arithmetic exact-count <= frequency-baseline exact-count on the constrained subset.
structural_predictions.scoring_rule: PASS if arithmetic exact > baseline exact on constrained masked numerals. Report exact/near rates.
